ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-21-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. DEFENDANT PAID PLAINTIFF BY CASH THE AMOUNT OF THE CLAIM, IN COURT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
